Caine! Female version (because it's very difficult to find a female Caine). I just watched episode 7 and remembered that I haven't posted bots in a while. So, to keep your thinking minds entertained, here's my newest creation! I like Digital Circus because I love crazy things!

I don't know who made the art, it's a shame!
